# devin_git_connections (Data Source)

Lists the git connections available to the enterprise, e.g. to look up the git_connection_id used by devin_git_permission.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "devin_git_connections" "all" {}

# Pick the GitHub App connection for use with devin_git_permission.
locals {
  github_connection_id = one([
    for c in data.devin_git_connections.all.connections : c.git_connection_id
    if c.git_provider_type == "github_app"
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `connections` (Attributes List) Git connections for the enterprise. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connections))

<a id="nestedatt--connections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connections`

Read-Only:

- `git_connection_id` (String) Git connection ID.
- `git_provider_type` (String) Provider type (e.g. github_app, gitlab_oauth).
- `host` (String) Git host the connection points at (e.g. github.com).
- `name` (String) Display name of the connection.
